	law_category = administrative
	law_gov_group = monarchy
	potential = {
		government_type = government_type:monarchy
	}
	antq_peregrini_status = {
		country_modifier = {
			global_pop_assimilation_speed_modifier = -0.02
			monthly_towards_centralization = societal_value_minor_monthly_move
		}
		years = 2
		estate_preferences = {
			nobles_estate
			burghers_estate
		}
	}
}
